creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
It's only minor problem, however it can unnecessary prolong 
updates for some.

I'm not sure portmaster should look for packages in (non existent)

http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-9.0-release/

at this time. 

http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-9-current/

is still most appropriate imho.
